articles.title: 'Probably not at her best as of now' - Deepti's slump adds to India's bowling worries
articles.description: With India's bowlers struggling for breakthroughs in the two losses against SA, bowling coach Salvi believes it's part of the process of finding the best attack

articles.title: Fakhar Zaman century gives Qalandars crucial win
articles.description: Shamyl Hussain and Rilee Rossouw kept Gladiators in the chase, but once they fell, the chase fell apart

articles.title: Shanaka banned from PSL for one year for IPL switch
articles.description: Shanaka opted out of a contract with Lahore Qalandars and later joined IPL team Rajasthan Royals

articles.title: Moni, Sharmin help Bangladesh register maiden ODI win against Sri Lanka
articles.description: Bangladesh lost four wickets for one run when they were close to the finish line, but averted disaster in the end

articles.title: Former Afghanistan quick Shapoor Zadran battles for his life in Delhi hospital
articles.description: Shapoor Zadran is suffering from Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a rare, life-threatening disease, in which the immune system starts failing

articles.title: Five UAE cricketers given citizenship through naturalisation
articles.description: Khuzaima Tanveer, Ajay Kumar, Akshdeep Nath, Harpreet Bhatia and Adeeb Usmani are the players with UAE citizenship

articles.title: Tryon and Wolvaardt breeze past India to 2-0 series lead
articles.description: Shafali, playing her 100th T20I, hit a half-century but her side just collapsed after that

articles.title: Sarfaraz appointed head coach as Pakistan name four newbies for Bangladesh Tests
articles.description: Abdullah Fazal, Amad Butt, Azan Awais, and Ghazi Ghori are the new faces in Pakistan's Test squad; Asad Shafiq (batting coach) and Umar Gul (bowling coach) join the back room

articles.title: Rwanda to host inaugural ICC Women's Challenge Trophy from April 18
articles.description: Italy, Nepal, Vanuatu and USA are the other teams in contention at the tournament

articles.title: Peter Siddle, Samit Patel barred from playing in T20 Blast 2026 due to participation in 'disapproved' league
articles.description: Peter Siddle and Samit Patel have been barred from playing in the T20 Blast in 2026 due to their participation in a 'disapproved' league for retired players in Goa earlier this year.

articles.title: PCB in talks to build cricket stadium in Saudi Arabia
articles.description: The governing body wants to build a facility which could organise top-level games, along with PSL matches.
